content:
🚛 We're Hiring | Freight Brokers
Join our growing team!
📍 Location: Mohali (Work From Office)
📅 Interview Mode: Face-to-Face
⚡ Joining: Immediate Joiners Preferred
🌎 Mandatory: Prior US Freight Brokerage Experience
If you have hands-on experience in the US logistics/freight industry and are looking for your next opportunity, we'd love to hear from you!
📩 Share your resume at hiring@alpha-consultants.in or DM me.
